title: kscloud.io DNS records
description: Shared schema for the kscloud.io zone record files. The zone is split into two source files, both projected into Azure by dns/main.bicep (which deploys their union): records.platform.json (mail / M365 foundation — carries the canonical zoneName, changed via PR only) and records.app.json (app custom domains — no zoneName, edited by the Add/Remove DNS Record workflows).

zoneName.description: DNS zone (apex) name, e.g. kscloud.io. Declared once, in records.platform.json (the canonical source); omitted from records.app.json.

type.description: DNS record type (NS and SOA are Azure-managed and must not be listed here)

name.description: Record name relative to the zone, or '@' for the apex

values.description: Record values. A=IPv4 address, CNAME=single target host, TXT=text string, MX='<preference> <exchange>' e.g. '0 mail.example.com'
